title: LEFT JOIN in view malfunctions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE VIEW v0 AS SELECT t1.c0, t0.c1 FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t0 ON t1.c0 = CAST(t0.c1 AS CHAR);
SELECT * FROM v0 WHERE NOT(v0.c1 IS NULL);
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN in view with condition fails to fetch row
